entryExit.text:
Adient plc (ADNT) — Entry / Exit Framework

HOLD zone: $18.79–$20.83 — current levels are fairly valued. No compelling reason to add or trim here.
Add / Initiate below $18.79 — material pullback that improves risk/reward.
Trim / Take Profits above $20.83 — approaching the 52-week high at $27.32. Risk/reward no longer favourable for new capital.
Stop-loss consideration: A sustained close below $9.98 (52-week low) would warrant reassessment.

sources.marketData: Live quote data sourced via DYOR HQ data pipeline (Google Sheets + Yahoo Finance). Fields include price, market capitalisation, 52-week range, P/E, EPS, and volume.
sources.companyFilings: Public company filings, regulatory announcements, investor presentations, and RNS where referenced in the analysis.
